description_long: This is a two-story brick pub with a steep, metal-clad roof and a prominent brick chimney. The ground floor features a classic pub facade with large display windows, a central wooden door, and signage above the entrance, all framed by a small fenced area and scattered autumn leaves. The upper floor has a single, large window with green curtains, set into a slightly protruding dormer structure. The side and rear walls are plain, constructed from dark brown brick, with no windows or decorative elements. The roof is pitched and covered in weathered metal panels, while the chimney is robust and detailed with realistic brickwork. The overall appearance suggests a traditional British or European urban pub, likely situated on a city street.
description: A traditional two-story brick pub with a steep metal roof, large front windows, and a central entrance, featuring classic signage and a prominent chimney.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large display windows, signage, and fenced area with autumn leaves.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying plain brickwork and the side profile of the roof and chimney, with no windows or doors.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat wall with no windows or doors, and the back of the roof and chimney.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with plain brickwork and the side profile of the roof and chimney.
attribute_signage: Wall-mounted rectangular sign above the entrance, dark background with white text, and two smaller window signs with white text and graphics. The signage is classic and pub-themed.
attribute_entrance_design: One main entrance located centrally on the front facade, consisting of a single wooden door with glass panels, flanked by large display windows. The entrance is framed by brickwork and a small fenced area, with a step leading up to the door.
attribute_window_arrangement: Three large rectangular windows on the ground floor (two display windows flanking the door), and one large rectangular window with green curtains on the upper floor, centered above the entrance. No windows are visible on the sides or rear.
attribute_architectural_style: Victorian-inspired urban pub, characterized by brick construction, steep metal roof, prominent chimney, and traditional pub signage and window arrangement.
